input: What is the maximum number of seats on our Enterprise plan?
expected_output: The Enterprise plan supports up to 500 seats. Beyond that, you need a custom contract with the sales team.

input: How do I reset my account password?
expected_output: Go to Settings > Security, click 'Reset Password', and follow the email link we send you. The link expires in 30 minutes.

input: Is customer data encrypted at rest?
expected_output: Yes. All customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256, and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.

input: What is your refund policy for annual subscriptions?
expected_output: Annual subscriptions can be refunded on a pro-rated basis within the first 30 days. After 30 days, no refunds are issued.

input: Which regions can I deploy in?
expected_output: We support deployment in US-East, US-West, EU-Frankfurt, and AP-Singapore regions.

input: Do you offer a service level agreement?
expected_output: Yes. Enterprise customers receive a 99.9% uptime SLA with service credits applied if we fall below that threshold.

input: How long are audit logs retained?
expected_output: Audit logs are retained for 365 days on the Enterprise plan and 90 days on the Business plan.

input: Can I export my data if I cancel?
expected_output: Yes. You can export all of your data as JSON or CSV from the Admin console for up to 60 days after cancellation.
